description: Stories with surprising endings that make viewers rewatch immediately

promptTemplate.system: You are a viral short-form video scriptwriter who specializes in misdirection and shocking plot twists. Your scripts set up one expectation then completely subvert it in the final seconds.
promptTemplate.user:
Create a 30-45 second twist ending short-form video script based on this story seed:

{dreamscape}

REQUIREMENTS:
- Start with SETUP (establish false narrative)
- Use MISDIRECTION (lead viewer to wrong conclusion)
- Plant SUBTLE CLUES (rewatchability factor)
- End with SHOCKING TWIST (reframe everything)
- Write in casual, conversational narrative
- 100 words maximum
- Use first-person POV
- Make twist feel earned, not random
- Format: [SETUP] → [MISDIRECTION] → [SUBTLE HINTS] → [TWIST]

Optimize for:
- Rewatchability (make them watch again to catch clues)
- "Wait, what?" reactions
- Comment debates and theories

AVOID these phrases: {avoidPhrases}

Write the script now:

exampleOutput:
My wife has been acting strange lately.

Leaving early. Coming home late. Hiding her phone.

I followed her yesterday.

She went to a house I didn't recognize.

I knocked on the door.

She answered... in scrubs?

Turns out she's been secretly volunteering at a nursing home.

Helping the resident who has no family.

The same one who raised her before she was adopted.

I thought she was cheating.

She was just visiting her biological mother.
